case_title: GRAND CENTRAL ANSWERING SERVICE VS LAW OFFICES OF BELLI AND MCLEAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAND CENTRAL ANSWERING SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF BELLI AND MCLEAN $865.63 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $905.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF BELLI AND MCLEAN

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-16-1997, DENIED
